page.title: Settings
page.subtitle: Customize the panel visual experience and review the current account information.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Adjust the panel theme, language and typography scale. These changes only affect this browser.
appearance.themeDescription: Choose a light or dark surface to work more comfortably.
appearance.lightDescription: Soft contrast and standard panel appearance.
appearance.darkDescription: Lower brightness for long sessions or low-light environments.
appearance.languageDescription: Choose the visible interface language. The selection is stored automatically in this browser.
appearance.languageSelectHelper: The change applies immediately and is stored in this browser.
appearance.fontSizeDescription: Adjust the overall text scale without modifying the panel structure.
appearance.fontLargeDescription: More comfortable reading and stronger visual presence.

account.title: Account
account.description: Information about the current session and identification data available on the frontend.

session.title: Session and security
session.description: Manage the active session from a dedicated, easy-to-find block.
session.currentDescription: The session remains synchronized with the existing authentication system.
session.logoutDescription: Close the current session on this device without modifying permissions or account settings.
